name: Grilled Fish W/Pineapple-Cilantro Sauce
recipeIngredient: -2 tablespoons NutraSweet (R) Spoonfull (TM)-2 teaspoons to 3 teaspoons
-Halibut, Haddock, or Salmon steaks or fillets (6 oz each)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium saucepan, heat pineapple chunks and juice for about 5 minutes over high heat until boiling.
2. Add garlic and jalapeno pepper; reduce heat and simmer uncovered for another 5 minutes.
3. Stir in cilantro until boiling.
4. Mix cornstarch with cold water. Stir into the boiling mixture and continue cooking, stirring constantly, until thickened.
5. Remove from heat and let cool for 2-3 minutes.
6. Stir in NutraSweet (R) Spoonfull (TM); season to taste with salt and pepper.
7. Serve warm over grilled fish or pork. Makes six servings.
